title: PropertyAsset
description: A piece of EDC-managed real estate — one of the ~60 million square feet of city-owned property (industrial parks, markets, piers, campuses, retail, ground leases) that EDC stewards on behalf of the City. MODELED ENTITY: EDC's asset portfolio is central to its mission but has NO Open Data dataset and NO public API. Schema reverse-engineered from how EDC describes its real estate; keyed on BBL and asset identifier.

name.description: Asset name (e.g. Brooklyn Army Terminal, Hunts Point, Sunset Park).

status.description: Availability / management status (e.g. Managed, Available, Leased, In Disposition).

tenants.description: Approximate number of tenants, if disclosed.
